claims.claim: We report on a structured triage of 11 candidate sub-8 GiB GGUF-format language model artifacts for local deployment on the NVIDIA GB10 platform (aarch64, CUDA 13 driver stack, ~121 GiB system RAM).

evidence_refs.quote: # Sub-8 GiB GGUF Model Zoo Triage on NVIDIA GB10: Feasibility, Throughput, and Toolchain Caveats

claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: Two representative quantized models—SmolLM3-3B Q4_K_M (1.78 GiB) and Qwen3.5-4B Q4_K_M (2.55 GiB)—were downloaded and subjected to local smoke-testing via `llama-cpp-python`.

evidence_refs.quote: # Sub-8 GiB GGUF Model Zoo Triage on NVIDIA GB10: Feasibility, Throughput, and Toolchain Caveats

claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: Qwen3.5-4B Q4_K_M passed a CPU-backend throughput benchmark at 21.82 tokens/s with a post-load RSS of approximately 2.78 GiB.

evidence_refs.quote: # Sub-8 GiB GGUF Model Zoo Triage on NVIDIA GB10: Feasibility, Throughput, and Toolchain Caveats

claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: SmolLM3-3B Q4_K_M failed during chat-template parsing and is held pending a newer `llama.cpp` build or template patch.

evidence_refs.quote: # Sub-8 GiB GGUF Model Zoo Triage on NVIDIA GB10: Feasibility, Throughput, and Toolchain Caveats

claims.claim: An attempt to rebuild `llama-cpp-python` with CUDA acceleration failed during CMake compiler detection on the aarch64 CUDA toolchain; all throughput figures therefore reflect CPU-only inference.

evidence_refs.quote: # Sub-8 GiB GGUF Model Zoo Triage on NVIDIA GB10: Feasibility, Throughput, and Toolchain Caveats

claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: GPU memory monitoring via `nvidia-smi` is not supported on GB10, necessitating RSS-based and `MemAvailable`-delta memory accounting.

evidence_refs.quote: # Sub-8 GiB GGUF Model Zoo Triage on NVIDIA GB10: Feasibility, Throughput, and Toolchain Caveats

claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: We conclude that a sub-8 GiB GGUF model zoo is viable with caveats, and recommend Qwen3.5-4B Q4_K_M (Apache-2.0) as the seed model, pending resolution of GPU acceleration and license verification for redistribution.

claims.claim: This study performs a structured triage of 11 candidate GGUF repositories with artifacts under 8 GiB, downloads two representative models, and evaluates local inference viability on the GB10 platform.
